final:
module top_module(
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Byte" *)
  input[7:0] A_i,
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Byte" *)
  input[7:0] B_i,
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Bit" *)
  input S_i,
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Byte" *)
  output[7:0] Y_o
wire neg_mux_output = S_i;
assign Y_o = neg_mux_output ? B_i : A_i;

endmodule
